vocab.meaning: trò chơi đóng vai sáng tạo
vocab.example: I spent countless afternoons engaged in imaginative role-play, pretending to be an astronaut exploring distant galaxies.

vocab.meaning: vui chơi tự do (không theo quy tắc gò bó)
vocab.example: In my youth, unstructured play in the local park was the highlight of my day, allowing me to let my curiosity run wild.

vocab.meaning: những nỗ lực/hoạt động nghệ thuật
vocab.example: I was quite fond of various artistic endeavors, such as finger painting and sculpting figures out of modeling clay.

vocab.meaning: sự gắng sức/hoạt động thể chất
vocab.example: Activities involving heavy physical exertion, like climbing trees or playing tag, were my absolute favorite things to do.

vocab.meaning: các hoạt động theo đuổi mang tính ít vận động (ngồi một chỗ)
vocab.example: While my friends liked football, I preferred more sedentary pursuits like reading adventure novels or assembling jigsaw puzzles.

vocab.meaning: khám phá thông qua xúc giác (chạm, nắn)
vocab.example: Building sandcastles at the beach provided a wonderful sense of tactile exploration that I found incredibly satisfying.
During my summer holidays, I loved to commune with nature by catching dragonflies near the pond behind my house.
Strategy board games were popular in my household, and looking back, they were instrumental for my cognitive development.

vocab.meaning: những cuộc phiêu lưu kỳ ảo/đầy cảm hứng
vocab.example: My siblings and I would often embark on whimsical adventures in the backyard, imagining the garden was a dense, enchanted forest.

vocab.meaning: học hỏi thông qua vận động cơ thể
vocab.example: I had a knack for kinesthetic learning, so I gravitated towards building complex structures with Lego blocks.
